## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No medical advice
- [ ] No treatment recommendations
- [ ] No patient-specific outputs
- [ ] Every clinical claim has source links
- [ ] No fake citations
- [ ] AI-generated output is marked for maintainer review

## Validation Checklist

- [ ] Scope matches the assigned chunk
- [ ] Output format matches the pack or skill spec
- [ ] Stable IDs are preserved where available
- [ ] Duplicates are flagged
- [ ] Unsupported or unclear claims are marked
- [ ] Links were checked where applicable
